given.description: Load a .we source file from tests/ by filename; used with 'When I compile and run it'
Store an inline welang expression; used with 'Then it should evaluate to {int}'
Store multiline welang function definitions from a docstring block; used with evaluate/call Then steps

when.description: Compile the program loaded via 'Given the welang program' and run the binary

then.description: Assert the program from 'When I compile and run it' exited with code 0
Compile definitions + main: {(equal [expr, N]): 0, _: 1} and assert exit 0; requires a prior 'Given the welang expression' step
Compile definitions + main: {(equal [(func input), expected]): 0, _: 1} and assert exit 0; uses definitions from 'Given the welang definitions:'
Compile definitions + main: 0 and assert compilation succeeds; uses definitions from 'Given the welang definitions:'

notes: 'Given the welang expression' and 'Given the welang definitions:' can be combined in the same scenario.
When adding a new step definition to cucumber_tests.rs, add it here too.
The {int} parameter in cucumber expressions parses signed integers (e.g. -9 is valid).
